message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title 2 assignData

actor "Actor" as actor
participant "CatERingAppManager.eventManager:EventManager" as eventManager
participant "eventManager.currentEvent:Event" as currentEvent
participant "r:EventReceiver" as receiver

actor -> eventManager : assignData(name,date,location,numberOfParticipants,serviceType,tipologyNote)

alt [currentEvent == null]
    eventManager --> actor : Throw UseCaseLogicException
else
    eventManager -> currentEvent : setName(name)
    activate currentEvent
    deactivate currentEvent
    
    eventManager -> currentEvent : setDate(date)
    activate currentEvent
    deactivate currentEvent
    
    eventManager -> currentEvent : setLocation(location)
    activate currentEvent
    deactivate currentEvent
    
    eventManager -> currentEvent : setNumberOfParticipants(numberOfParticipants)
    activate currentEvent
    deactivate currentEvent
    
    eventManager -> currentEvent : setServiceType(serviceType)
    activate currentEvent
    deactivate currentEvent
    
    eventManager -> currentEvent : setTipologyNote(tipologyNote)
    activate currentEvent
    deactivate currentEvent
    
    group for each r in receivers
        eventManager -> receiver : notifyDataAssigned(currentEvent)
        activate receiver
        deactivate receiver
    end
end

eventManager --> actor

@enduml
```
